SQLLite.SQL: SELECT OT.ORDER_ID, OT.PRINTER_TYPE, OT.NO_OF_COPIES, OT.TRAY, OT.ORDER_DESCRIPTION, OT.MODULE_GROUP, OT.FILE_PREFIX, OT.MODULE_NAME FROM ORDER_TYPES OT WHERE OT.ORDER_ID = ${param.reportId} or OT.MODULE_NAME = ${param.reportId}

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper edsAdmin cpSuper
